name: OpenClaw Installation Troubleshooting
description: Common OpenClaw installation failures and step-by-step solutions for Node.js, Docker, Windows, and Linux environments.
long_description: A comprehensive troubleshooting guide covering the most common failures when installing and configuring OpenClaw — the AI Gateway/Agent framework. Includes solutions for permission errors, version mismatches, port conflicts, Docker issues, and platform-specific problems. Feed this bundle to your AI agents to help users diagnose and resolve OpenClaw setup issues quickly.

use_cases: Fixing Docker and port conflict problems
Supporting users on Windows, macOS, and Linux
